title: erigeron flettii
intro: Erigeron flettii, also known as Flett's Daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron flettii include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Erigeron flettii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
